name: Gîl-Pondmeril
personality: This resplendent ✦-eyed duck sports a halo that frames its chaotic decision-making in an eerily beatific glow. It thrives when everything is on fire, considers documentation a philosophical category error, and always seems to ship anyway.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
